source: CMS 2026 Marketplace Open Enrollment PUFs and PolicyEngine US Data block-population geography
allocation_method: HealthCare.gov-platform districts use CMS county-level PUF rows allocated with PolicyEngine population shares. State-based marketplace districts use observed CMS state-level PUF totals with a PolicyEngine-modeled local backfill.

records.allocation_basis: CMS state-level OEP PUF total allocated to counties and 119th congressional districts using PolicyEngine US Data's block-population county-CD distribution.
